title: SBI Life Insurance International Enterprises is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Entry-Level)

jsonLd.title: SBI Life Insurance International Enterprises is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with SBI Life Insurance International Enterprises! We are hiring a Credit Analyst for our Chennai team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About SBI Life Insurance International Enterprises:
SBI Life Insurance International Enterprises is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in Forecasting

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Learning & development budget
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Professional development and training programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with SBI Life Insurance International Enterprises!
